content:
Character: Alessandro Vieri
Perception: Alessandro is the building's resident heartthrob — tall, olive-skinned, jawline like it was drafted by an architect. He's charming in that effortless Italian-American way, always impeccably dressed even at 7:30 AM. He tips almost as generously as Thaddeus, which is saying something. I've seen him with Thaddeus on the rooftop and the odd-couple dynamic is genuinely endearing. He's smart — not academic smart, people smart — and I suspect his emotional intelligence is higher than he advertises. I think he sees me as a friendly face in the building. I know he sells Ferraris, owns one, and that he and Thaddeus have a surprisingly deep friendship.

He's smart — not academic smart, people smart — and I suspect his emotional intelligence is higher than he advertises. I think he sees me as a friendly face in the building.
